sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check the current state after clicking all 12 ring pixels.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

print("Key objects:")
for n in nodes:
    c = n['color']
    if c in ['W', 'M', 'G'] or (c == 'p' and n['pixels'] >= 15):
        center_r = sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        center_c = sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        print(f"  color={c} px={n['pixels']} center=({center_r},{center_c})")

ring = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'p' and n['pixels'] == 1]
print(f"\nRing pixels: {len(ring)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

2. A new purple square appears on the path toward the goal
3. The goal may move
